evidence_level: binary64 exact-Haar two-pole power audit with Hutchinson traces and truncated Hardy energies; not interval validated
limitations: The Hardy energies are truncated after the archived maximum power; no interval tail enclosure is applied.
Hutchinson probes estimate Hilbert-Schmidt norms and are not deterministic uppers.
The two-pole factors and bulk radii are binary64 eigensolver outputs.
A uniform analytic directional Hardy-energy bound is not inferred from the finite audit.
